name: qwen-vts-orchestrator
description: Delegate cheap code-location to a local Qwen2.5-Coder (Ollama, full-GPU) that drives vs-token-safer's vs-search tools — so Claude spends its tokens on reasoning, not raw search output. Ships the qvts CLI, a live web dashboard with a 3-way token-savings panel, and an auto-loading delegation-routing skill.
